mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS stays near the zero lower bound and CPIAUCSL is still low and stable, markets interpret policy as pinned and real-rate pressure as limited. That combination supports a risk-on move that lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if FEDFUNDS remains near zero and CPIAUCSL is subdued but the 10-year yield falls on average over the next 20 trading days in more than 60% of such instances.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE after a weak PAYEMS print signals labor-market deterioration and weaker growth expectations. That should reduce term premiums and push the 10-year Treasury yield down within 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp over 2 months while PAYEMS slows or contracts
failure_condition: Rejected if, after a 0.2pp UNRATE rise accompanied by PAYEMS deterioration, the 10-year yield does not decline over the next 20 trading days in at least 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in RSAFS indicates firmer consumer spending and stronger nominal demand. Stronger demand lifts growth and inflation expectations, which should increase the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if positive 1-month momentum in RSAFS is not followed by a higher 10-year yield over the next 5 trading days in a statistically meaningful share of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises while HOUST remains firm, the economy is signaling stronger real activity and tighter capacity use. That should raise inflation risk and term premium expectations, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield up over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO is above its 3-month moving average and HOUST is not declining
failure_condition: Rejected if simultaneous strength in INDPRO and HOUST fails to precede a 20-day rise in the 10-year yield in at least 55% of triggered samples.

mechanism_narrative: A 20-trading-day rise in FEDFUNDS after an extended period of near-zero rates signals tightening that raises expected future short rates. That should lift the 10-year Treasury yield over the same month-long horizon.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25pp within 2 months
failure_condition: Rejected if FEDFUNDS increases by at least 0.25pp over 2 months but the 10-year yield fails to rise over the following 20 trading days in most triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: If UNRATE is already elevated and PAYEMS keeps weakening, investors should price a deeper slowdown and more policy accommodation. That combination should lower the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE stays above 7.0% and PAYEMS falls for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Rejected if high unemployment plus falling payrolls does not precede a lower 10-year yield over 60 trading days in at least 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: In a recovery regime, rising GDPC1 after prior weakness should strengthen nominal growth expectations and steepen rate expectations. That should push the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if GDP rebounds in recovery periods but the 10-year yield does not rise over the next 20 trading days in a majority of comparable observations.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO weakens while CPIAUCSL keeps rising, the economy shows stagflationary pressure: softer real output with sticky inflation. That should force lower growth expectations and eventually reduce the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for 2 months while CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate stays above its 12-month average
failure_condition: Rejected if weak industrial production plus sticky inflation does not precede a lower 10-year yield over 60 trading days in at least 55% of triggered samples.
